events.appearance_notes: Observed event; There was only a man in purple sitting in front of the table in the room, with a computer with a bright screen in front of him.
events.event_text: From 0.0s to 23.1s, there was only a man in purple sitting in front of the table in the room, with a computer with a bright screen in front of him.

events.appearance_notes: High activity; Two people came in, wearing white and black clothes respectively. The man in white clothes handed something to the man in purple.
events.event_text: From 23.1s to 30.8s, two people came in, wearing white and black clothes respectively. The man in white clothes handed something to the man in purple.

events.appearance_notes: High activity; The man in white held a gun and pinched the collar of the man in purple. The two clashed. The man in black squatted down and stood up, and then the man in black went out.
events.event_text: From 32.1s to 42.5s, the man in white held a gun and pinched the collar of the man in purple. The two clashed. The man in black squatted down and stood up, and then the man in black went out.

events.appearance_notes: High activity; The man in white and the man in purple were in a stalemate, and the man in black came in and left.
events.event_text: From 42.5s to 51.1s, the man in white and the man in purple were in a stalemate, and the man in black came in and left.

events.appearance_notes: High activity; The man in white with a gun pushed the man in purple into the checkout counter, and the man in black came in with a black bag.
events.event_text: From 52.5s to 60.5s, the man in white with a gun pushed the man in purple into the checkout counter, and the man in black came in with a black bag.

events.appearance_notes: High activity; The man in black took out the contents of the drawer, and the man in white stood behind the cashier.
events.event_text: From 60.5s to 83.1s, the man in black took out the contents of the drawer, and the man in white stood behind the cashier.

events.appearance_notes: High activity; The man in black stood up and turned around, then opened the black cabinet to put things in. The man in white with a gun stood up and guarded the man at the cashier.
events.event_text: From 83.1s to 131.3s, the man in black stood up and turned around, then opened the black cabinet to put things in. The man in white with a gun stood up and guarded the man at the cashier.

events.appearance_notes: High activity; The man in black turned around and left with a black bag, and then the man in white with a gun also left together.
events.event_text: From 131.3s to 138.7s, the man in black turned around and left with a black bag, and then the man in white with a gun also left together.

events.appearance_notes: Observed event; The man in purple stood up and ran out of the door.
